feedback: Spec authored for REQ-000055. Covers all 16 plan tasks (TASK-001..TASK-016) with concrete API contracts (TypeScript signatures), Zod schemas, error taxonomy with exact exit codes, redactor whitelist per event type, fixtures, and >90 concrete test cases (T001-* through T016-*) each with setup/action/expected outcomes. Behavioral acceptance criteria are used for shell scripts and evidence artifacts rather than fragile byte-level assertions. Integration points, cross-references to existing modules (via Grep hints), and universal invariants (strict TS, no live sockets in default jest, no plaintext secrets, MutationBarrier fail-closed) are documented. No blockers.

artifacts.title: Implementation Spec: REQ-000055 — Live Homelab End-to-End Enablement
